findings.message: Redis alert rule is defined in 'postgres_alerts.yml' which is named after a different service. While the wildcard loading in prometheus.yml will find this, consider moving the redis alert rule to a dedicated 'redis_alerts.yml' file for clarity and maintainability.
findings.suggestion: Rename or split the file to 'redis_alerts.yml' or create a separate alert file and move the redis alert rule there
